# Bel Ağrısı Serisi — Derleme (2026-03-22)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### Association of oxidative stress with postural control and functional outcomes in lumbar degenerative disease: An exploratory cross-sectional study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik association of oxidative stress with postural control and fonksiyonal sonuçs in lomber (bel bölgesi) degenerative disease: an exploratory cross-sectional study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of orthopaedic science : official journal of the japanese orthopaedic association. 2026 mar 19. Anahtar kavramlar: association, journal, orthopaedic, oxidative, stress, postural.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41862304/

### Central Laminectomy Contralateral Lumbar Decompression for Lumbar Degenerative Disease using Unilateral Biportal Endoscopy: a technical note and preliminary clinical results.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik central laminectomy contralateral lomber (bel bölgesi) decompression for lomber (bel bölgesi) degenerative disease using unilateral biportal endoscopy: a technical note and preliminary clinical results. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: world neurosurgery. 2026 mar 18. Anahtar kavramlar: lomber (bel bölgesi), central, laminectomy, contralateral, decompression, degenerative.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41862154/

### KLF2-Mediated Modulation of oxidative stress and pyroptosis by Vanillic acid in intervertebral disc degeneration.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik klf2-mediated modulation of oxidative stress and pyroptosis by vanillic acid in intervertebral disc degeneration. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: biochemical pharmacology. 2026 mar 18. Anahtar kavramlar: klf, mediated, modulation, oxidative, stress, pyroptosis.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41861963/

### Renal cell carcinoma presenting with orbital metastasis as the initial symptom: A case report.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik renal cell carcinoma presenting with orbital metastasis as the initial symptom: a case report. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: medicine. 2026 mar 20. Anahtar kavramlar: renal, cell, carcinoma, presenting, orbital, metastasis.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41861213/

### Corrigendum to 'Intradiscal linezolid (PP353) treatment for chronic low back pain associated with Modic change type 1: an international, first-in-human, randomised, sham procedure-controlled, double-blind, phase 1b clinical trial' eClinicalMedicine 2026; 92: 103764.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik corrigendum to 'intradiscal linezolid (pp353) treatment for chronic bel ağrısı associated with modic change type 1: an international, first-in-human, randomised, sham procedure-controlled, double-blind, phase 1b clinical klinik çalışma' eclinicalmedicine 2026; 92: 103764. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: eclinicalmedicine. 2026 mar. Anahtar kavramlar: eclinicalmedicine, corrigendum, intradiscal, linezolid, treatment, chronic.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41859672/

### Advances in Stereotactic Navigation for Primary Spine and Pelvis Tumor Resection and Reconstruction: A Systematic Review.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik advances in stereotactic navigation for primary spine and pelvis tumor resection and reconstruction: a sistematik derleme. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: hss journal : the musculoskeletal journal of hospital for special surgery. 2026 mar 17. Anahtar kavramlar: journal, advances, stereotactic, navigation, primary, spine.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41859436/

### Commentary on "Identifying patients at risk for a facility discharge following elective one or two level lumbar fusion".
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik commentary on "identifying patients at risk for a facility discharge following elective one or two level lomber (bel bölgesi) fusion". konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: north american spine society journal. 2026 mar. Anahtar kavramlar: commentary, identifying, patients, risk, facility, discharge.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41859184/

### Percutaneous Endoscopic Lumbar Decompression Using a Novel L-Shaped Impactor for Treating Lumbar Foraminal and Nerve Root Canal Stenosis in Elderly Patients With High Iliac Crests: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik percutaneous endoscopic lomber (bel bölgesi) decompression using a novel l-shaped impactor for treating lomber (bel bölgesi) foraminal and nerve root canal stenosis in elderly patients with high iliac crests: a retrospective cohort study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: orthopaedic surgery. 2026 mar 20. Anahtar kavramlar: lomber (bel bölgesi), percutaneous, endoscopic, decompression, using, novel.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41858221/
